title: /men
text: /men Compile menu bars, menus, and menu items. /men { /aft= DateTime } { /bef= DateTime } { Library } Switches /aft= or /bef= Parameters Library —name of the library containing the objects to compile; wildcard characters are permitted. If omitted, all menu bars, menus, and menu item are compiled. Use With ide.exe —Uniface IDE Description The location of compiled menu bars, menus, and menu items is determined by the $RSO path. Related Links Compiling from the IDE Command Line The IDE command line can be used to compile multiple objects without opening the IDE. It is especially useful for automating compilation by means of batch scripts. Menu Objects Uniface enables you to define menu bar, drop-down menu, and pop-up menu objects for use in Windows applications. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
